step_rationale: Plasmalogens dysregulated in myocardial injury; predictor of post-MI heart failure.
mechanism: Phosphatidylethanolamine plasmalogen dysregulated in myocardial injury and post-MI heart failure.

references.title: Serum lipidomics reveals phosphatidylethanolamine and phosphatidylcholine disorders in patients with myocardial infarction and post-myocardial infarction-heart failure.
